'''chakobo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:focaloid|focaloid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-k-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:focaloid|focaloid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| chakobo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chækebeth|chækebeth]] || [[word:chækebej|chækebej]] || [[word:chækebesh|chækebesh]] || [[word:chækebe|chækebe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chakokoboth|chakokoboth]] || [[word:chakokoboj|chakokoboj]] || [[word:chakokobosh|chakokobosh]] || [[word:chakokobo|chakokobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chakoboth|chakoboth]] || [[word:chakoboj|chakoboj]] || [[word:chakobosh|chakobosh]] || [[word:chakobo|chakobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chakofboth|chakofboth]] || [[word:chakofboj|chakofboj]] || [[word:chakofbosh|chakofbosh]] || [[word:chakofbof|chakofbof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chakobotho|chakobotho]] || [[word:chakobojo|chakobojo]] || [[word:chakobosho|chakobosho]] || [[word:chakoboko|chakoboko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chakoboth|chakoboth]] || [[word:chakoboj|chakoboj]] || [[word:chakobosh|chakobosh]] || [[word:chakobo|chakobo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chakobothol|chakobothol]] || [[word:chakobojol|chakobojol]] || [[word:chakoboshol|chakoboshol]] || [[word:chakobokol|chakobokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chakobothotho|chakobothotho]] || [[word:chakobojojo|chakobojojo]] || [[word:chakoboshosho|chakoboshosho]] || [[word:chakoboko|chakoboko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chakobothon|chakobothon]] || [[word:chakobojon|chakobojon]] || [[word:chakoboshon|chakoboshon]] || [[word:chakobokon|chakobokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chakobothoro|chakobothoro]] || [[word:chakobojoro|chakobojoro]] || [[word:chakoboshoro|chakoboshoro]] || [[word:chakobokoro|chakobokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a335513}}
